description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-examples/kubernetes-deploy and defines two stages: build and deploy, with a global variable KUBE_DOMAIN set to example.com. Add a build job that runs in the build stage, is limited to the master branch, and executes the shell command `command build`. Add a deploy job that runs in the deploy stage, is also limited to the master branch, executes `command deploy`, sets the environment name to production with URL http://production.example.com, and defines a job‑level variable DISABLE_POSTGRES='yes'.
